name: Q2 Platform Migration
description: Migrate the core platform infrastructure to the new Kubernetes-based architecture. This includes service mesh integration, traffic shifting, and gradual rollout.
comments: Need to coordinate with the SRE team on this.
Blocked until the network security review is complete.

name: Add OAuth2 Login
description: Implement OAuth2 authentication flow with support for Google and GitHub providers. Must include refresh token handling and session management.

name: Refactor API Gateway
description: Refactor the API gateway to use the new middleware pipeline architecture. This will improve request processing performance and make it easier to add new middleware components.
comments: The auth middleware change is already done. Moving on to logging.
Need to discuss the new middleware ordering with the team.

name: Database Sharding Plan
description: Design and implement a database sharding strategy for the main application database. Currently blocked pending infrastructure capacity planning.
comments: Waiting on DevOps to provide the new cluster specs.

name: Update User Dashboard
description: Revamp the user dashboard with new analytics widgets and improved data visualization. Includes new chart components and export functionality.
comments: Widget components look good. Ready for QA on the export feature.

name: Fix Login Timeout
description: Fix the login session timeout issue affecting users with expired tokens. The root cause was an incorrect TTL check in the session validator.

tasks.name: Fix TTL comparison in session validator

comments: Fix deployed to production. Monitoring shows no recurrence.
Root cause documented in the incident report.

name: Implement Dark Mode
description: Add dark mode support across the entire application. Should respect system preferences and allow manual override via a toggle in user settings.
comments: Design team has signed off on the palette.
Need to audit all existing components for contrast issues.

name: Webhook Integration System
description: Build a webhook system that allows external services to subscribe to application events. Must include retry logic, delivery logs, and a secret signing mechanism.

name: Upgrade Node.js to v22
description: Update the project to use Node.js v22 LTS. This involves updating the Docker base images, CI pipelines, and verifying compatibility of all dependencies.
comments: All dependencies checked. Only needs Docker and CI updates.

name: Add Email Notification Templates
description: Create HTML email templates for all notification types: welcome email, password reset, weekly digest, and alert notifications. Must support both plain text and HTML formats.
comments: Litmus test results are in — Gmail and Outlook have rendering quirks.
Waiting on final copy from the marketing team.

name: Performance Audit & Optimization
description: Conduct a thorough performance audit of the frontend application. Measure Core Web Vitals, identify bottlenecks, and implement targeted optimizations.

tasks.name: Run Lighthouse CI on all pages

comments: Lighthouse scores improved from 62 to 88 on mobile after initial fixes.
Need to investigate the slow queries on the dashboard endpoint.

name: API Rate Limiting v2
description: Replace the current basic rate limiter with a distributed token-bucket implementation using Redis. Add per-endpoint limits and clearer rate limit headers.
comments: Redis cluster is already set up in staging. Ready for testing.
Remember to document the new headers in the developer portal.

name: Mobile App v2
description: Develop version 2 of the mobile application with offline support, push notifications, and a redesigned navigation system. Blocked pending the design system audit.
comments: Design system audit is expected to complete in Q3.
We should evaluate Expo vs bare React Native before proceeding.

name: GDPR Compliance Module
description: Implement GDPR compliance features: data export/delete flows, consent management, and privacy policy versioning. On hold pending legal review of the data retention policy.
comments: Consent banner is ready but legal hasn't approved the copy yet.
Data retention policy draft is with the legal team.

name: Search Autocomplete Feature
description: Add an autocomplete dropdown to the global search bar. Should index recent searches and suggest results from users, projects, and documents.
comments: Keyboard navigation works well. Still need to test with screen readers.
Search indexing performance looks good — no regression.

name: CSV Export Enhancement
description: Enhance the CSV export to support custom field selection, date range filtering, and large dataset streaming. Existing implementation blocks the event loop for large exports.
comments: Streaming approach resolved the memory issue. Benchmarks look solid.
Need final sign-off from the data team on the output format.

name: Environment Variable Validation
description: Add startup-time validation for all required environment variables with clear error messages. Prevents silent failures in production due to misconfiguration.

tasks.name: Write clear error messages for each var

comments: Deployed. Caught a missing DATABASE_URL in staging within minutes.

name: Replace Moment.js with date-fns
description: Replace Moment.js with date-fns to reduce bundle size by ~150KB gzipped. Update all date formatting and manipulation imports across the codebase.
comments: Bundle size reduced by 148KB. All date formats verified.

name: Dependency Vulnerability Remediation
description: Address critical and high-severity vulnerabilities identified by npm audit. Upgrade or replace affected packages and verify no breaking changes were introduced.

tasks.name: Verify no breaking changes in upgraded pkgs

comments: All critical vulnerabilities resolved. Express v5 migration was smooth.

name: Multi-Tenant Support
description: Design and implement multi-tenant architecture with isolated data per organization. Includes tenant provisioning, migration strategy, and billing integration.
comments: Requires significant database changes. Needs architecture review.

name: Real-Time Collaboration
description: Add real-time collaborative editing with WebSocket-based sync. Support presence indicators, live cursors, and conflict resolution using CRDTs.
comments: Yjs seems like the best fit. Need to evaluate sync server options.
Should we use a managed service or self-host the sync server?

name: Internationalization (i18n)
description: Add full internationalization support starting with Japanese, Spanish, and German. Must support RTL languages, locale-aware date/number formatting, and dynamic language switching.
comments: react-i18next chosen. Need to set up the translation pipeline.
Japanese translation vendor has been contacted.

name: Migrate to Vite
description: Replace the current Webpack build system with Vite for faster development HMR and improved production builds. Must maintain existing build outputs and CI integration.
comments: HMR speed improvement is dramatic in the prototype.
Need to handle the custom SVG sprite loader — no direct Vite equivalent.

name: SSO Integration (SAML)
description: Add SAML 2.0 single sign-on support for enterprise customers. Must handle IdP-initiated and SP-initiated flows with automatic user provisioning.
comments: Three enterprise customers are waiting on this feature.
Okta and Azure AD are the primary IdPs to target.

name: Audit Logging System
description: Implement a comprehensive audit logging system to track all user and system actions. Must include searchable log viewer, retention policies, and export capabilities.

tasks.name: Build log viewer UI with filters

comments: Compliance requirement for SOC2. Need this by end of quarter.

name: REST API v2 Deprecation
description: Deprecate the v1 REST API and migrate all consumers to v2. Maintain backward compatibility with sunset headers and a migration guide.
comments: Three internal services still using v1. Migration planned for next sprint.
Sunset headers have been active for 2 weeks. No issues reported.

name: Notification Preferences UI
description: Build a notification preferences page that lets users control which events trigger notifications and which channels (email, in-app, push) they receive.
comments: Design is approved. Working on the save integration.
Need to connect to the notification service for channel validation.

name: Kubernetes Migration
description: Migrate all production services from Docker Compose to Kubernetes. Includes Helm chart creation, service mesh setup, and gradual traffic shifting.

tasks.name: Create Helm charts for all services

comments: Staging cluster is provisioned. Blocked on network policy review.
Helm charts are ready. Need to test the rollout strategy.

name: SOC2 Compliance Certification
description: Achieve SOC2 Type II certification. Requires security policy documentation, access control reviews, vulnerability management program, and third-party auditor engagement.
comments: Policy docs are drafted. Awaiting legal review before auditor engagement.
Vulnerability scanner selection is in progress.

name: File Upload Limit Increase
description: Increase the maximum file upload size from 10MB to 50MB. Requires updating the frontend uploader, API validation, and adding chunked upload support for large files.

tasks.name: Verify max size validation on backend

comments: Chunked upload works well. Need to verify the progress bar accuracy.
Should we also add a file type whitelist while we're at it?

name: Error Boundary Refactor
description: Refactor React error boundaries to provide granular fallback UIs per feature module. Include error reporting integration and recovery actions.
comments: Granular boundaries prevent entire app crashes. Recovery flows need QA.

name: CI/CD Pipeline Optimization
description: Optimize the CI/CD pipeline to reduce build times. Implemented dependency caching, parallel job execution, and conditional test stages.
comments: Build time reduced from 12 minutes to 4 minutes. Great win.

name: API Documentation Generator
description: Set up an OpenAPI/Swagger documentation generator that auto-generates API docs from the codebase. Integrated into the CI pipeline to keep docs in sync.
comments: Auto-generated docs are live at /api-docs. Team loves it.

name: Database Connection Pool Tuning
description: Tune the PostgreSQL connection pool settings to prevent connection exhaustion under load. Adjusted pool size, idle timeout, and added connection monitoring.

tasks.name: Load test with peak traffic patterns

comments: Connection exhaustion eliminated. Dashboard shows healthy pool utilization.

name: Session Management Refactor
description: Refactor session management to use Redis-backed sessions with automatic expiration and rotation. Replaced the previous in-memory store that didn't scale across instances.
comments: Zero downtime migration completed. Sessions now survive restarts.
Concurrent session limit working well in production.
